text: AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) @ hupsuneamcantitia (©) aoriancanu * ACM is a regional service ¢ Certs cannot leave the region they are generated or imported in * To use a cert with an ALB in ap-southeast-2 you need a cert in ACM in ap-southeast-2 C) ¢ Global Services such as CloudFront operate as though within ‘us-east-1 E)
